objective: Establish a repeatable baseline for measuring CodeGraph value across the project group without project business development.

impact_command_baseline.purpose: Locate the current impact-report validator and its evidence constants.
Inspect file-level symbols and indexed dependents for the validator.
Select impacted tests for the validator change.
Negative control for broad symbol noise.

text_scan_baseline.command: rg -n "validate_codegraph_impact_report_dry_run|CODEGRAPH-IMPACT-REPORT-DRY-RUN-20260621|GPCF-CODEGRAPH-IMPACT-REPORT-DRY-RUN-005|GPCF-CODEGRAPH-IMPACT-METRICS-BASELINE-006" docs tools governance harness loop 09-status
text_scan_baseline.limitation: Text scan remains useful for discovery but cannot classify symbols, dependents, affected tests, or noisy impact queries.

coverage.definition: All project-group repositories have initialized CodeGraph indexes and .codegraph remains outside Git.

query_precision.definition: Targeted query returns the intended validator as the top result.

impact_precision.definition: Affected analysis returns tests and dependency traversal for the target file.

noise_control.definition: Broad symbols are measured and rejected when too noisy for gate evidence.
noise_control.baseline: main produces 101 affected symbols and is not usable for gate evidence

manual_scan_reduction.definition: Compare CodeGraph targeted evidence with rg text scan volume.
manual_scan_reduction.baseline: CodeGraph direct file/symbol/test impact set vs rg 13 files and 28 lines

review_rework_count.definition: Track whether CodeGraph-assisted review rework keeps trending down across repeated tasks.
review_rework_count.baseline: 0 at baseline; compare against future task-intake and business-change evidence

gate_replayability.definition: The baseline is guarded by a validator that reruns CodeGraph, rg, coverage, and boundary checks.
